flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Newberry College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (53.6% → 45.1%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Newberry College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (36.7% → 32.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Newberry College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Newberry College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.1k).
